title: phyllobolus noctiflorus
intro: Phyllobolus noctiflorus, also known as Night-flowering Phyllobolus or Night-blooming Phyllobolus, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Phyllobolus noctiflorus can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to soothe coughs and promote overall well-being.
